ShoppingList.title: Shopping List
ShoppingList.emptyHint: Add items using the field above
ShoppingList.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
ShoppingList.swipeLeftHint: Left half: left = delete, right = edit

History.title: Shopping History
History.description: View completed shopping trips and statistics
History.clearMessage: All shopping records will be deleted.

Tutorial.step1Desc: Type the item name and tap the + button to add it to your list.
Tutorial.step2Desc: Grab the item on its LEFT half and swipe left. A red background with a trash icon will appear.
Tutorial.step3Desc: Grab the item on its LEFT half and swipe right. A blue background with a pencil icon will appear and an edit dialog will open.
Tutorial.step4Desc: Grab the item on its RIGHT half and swipe right. The quantity will increase by 1.
Tutorial.step5Desc: Grab the item on its RIGHT half and swipe left. The quantity will decrease by 1.
Tutorial.step6Desc: Tap items to mark them for shopping, then tap the green button to start.
Tutorial.step7Desc: During shopping, tap each item to mark it as bought.
Tutorial.step8Desc: When done, tap Finish Shopping. The session will be saved to history.
Tutorial.step9Desc: View past shopping trips and statistics in Settings > History.
Tutorial.step10Desc: Tap the list name in the header → opens list management. Tap ··· next to a list and choose 'Share List'. A 6-character code will be generated.
Tutorial.step11Desc: In list management, tap 'Join a shared list' and enter the code from another phone.

Backup.title: Data Backup
Backup.description: Export all data (list, history, settings) via sharing or import from clipboard.
Backup.importMessage: Current data will be replaced with data from clipboard. App restart required.
Backup.importDoneMessage: Data has been restored. Restart the app to load changes.
Backup.importError: Failed to import data. Check the format.
Backup.noData: No data found in clipboard for import.

ClipboardList.importNoNew: All items from clipboard already exist in the list

Lists.deleteListConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
Lists.lastList: You cannot delete the last list

Sharing.title: Share List
Sharing.shareDescription: Share this list with family or friends. Changes will sync in real time.
Sharing.codeInstructions: Enter this code on another phone in 1GoShop
Sharing.unlinkConfirm: The list will remain on your device but will stop syncing with others.
Sharing.joinDescription: Enter the 6-character code from another phone
Sharing.networkError: Check your internet connection and try again
Sharing.offlineWarning: Changes saved locally but won't sync with other devices until connection is restored.
Sharing.unlinkError: Failed to disconnect. Check your connection and try again.
Sharing.deleteError: Failed to delete the list. Check your connection and try again.
Sharing.lastMemberDeleteWarning: You are the last member of this shared list. Deleting it will permanently erase all data including shopping history. Continue?
Sharing.conflictMessage: The list was changed by another device while you were offline. Which version do you want to keep?
